## 1. Fact Sheet


### 2026 Seoul Startup Hub Global Program Application


### Company Name


### StepHow Inc.


### CEO Name


### Jasper Hwang

| 1. Company Introduction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1) Please give a brief elevator pitch of the company.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| StepHow is an AI startup founded in 2024 by a serial entrepreneur with a venture capital background, alongside experienced AI and engineering leaders. Its flagship product, Wissly, is an enterprise AI RAG agent that learns from large-scale internal documents on local PCs to automate document workflows and support data-driven decision-making. Backed by $0.5M in seed funding from MashUp Ventures, The Ventures, and Antler, StepHow now serves over 100 companies and is expanding globally through its U.S. subsidiary. |
| 2) Please submit the available URL of the participant's one-minute Pitch video.     ※ Mandatory for 2026 SusHi Tech Tokyo Program                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| https://youtu.be/LZDv2buT0VM                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |

| 2. Product/Service Introduction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
|------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1) What is the name of the product/service you want to introduce to the global market?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Wissly                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| 2) Has the product/service been released?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ■ Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 3) Please give a brief introduction of the product/service.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Wissly AI leverages a proprietary Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture to automatically preprocess and learn large-scale enterprise documents without manual intervention. It enables AI Agents to perform document search, analysis, comparison, and generation while structuring insights based on contextual relationships across files. Designed for real-time processing of unlimited documents, Wissly ensures high scalability and performance. The cloud version is offered at $20 per user per month, and an enterprise on-premise plan is available for organizations requiring enhanced security and internal deployment. By delivering evidence-based summaries and recommendations, Wissly reduces search time and improves decision-making speed and accuracy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 4) Who are the target customers of the product/service and why?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Wissly targets mid-to-large manufacturing and logistics enterprises in Japan with highly document-intensive operations. Our primary customers are CIOs, IT managers, and digital transformation leaders who oversee ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle, as well as NAS and on-premise file servers. These organizations often struggle with fragmented internal documents, slow information retrieval, repetitive reporting tasks, and decision-making that depends heavily on individual experience rather than structured data. Existing solutions are typically high-cost global vendors that require complex customization and long deployment cycles. Wissly addresses these challenges through a scalable SaaS model with a lower entry barrier, while also offering an on-premise option tailored to security-sensitive enterprises in Japan.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 5) What is the pain point of the target customers the product/service seeks to solve?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| In Japan’s manufacturing and logistics sectors, enterprises manage vast volumes of internal documents across ERP systems, NAS, and on-premise file servers, often combined with legacy infrastructure. This fragmented environment results in slow information retrieval, duplicated work, manual reporting, and decision-making that relies heavily on individual experience rather than consolidated data. Wissly addresses these challenges with an automated RAG-based AI platform that learns from distributed enterprise documents without complex manual configuration and provides contextual search and evidence-based reporting. Compared to traditional SI-driven solutions that require high upfront costs and long deployment cycles, Wissly enables faster implementation, lower entry barriers, and scalable SaaS pricing tailored to enterprise needs.                                                                                                                                                 |
| 6) Who is/are the competitor(s) of the product/service and why?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| In the Japanese market, direct competitors include large SI-based RAG implementations and global enterprise software vendors that offer customized AI or knowledge management solutions. These solutions typically require high upfront investment, complex integration with existing systems, and long deployment cycles. Indirect competitors include generic LLM tools and cloud-based search platforms that are not optimized for large-scale enterprise environments, especially those relying on on-premise servers, NAS storage, and legacy infrastructure commonly found in Japanese corporations. Wissly differentiates itself through an automated RAG pipeline that learns from massive, distributed internal documents without extensive manual configuration, enabling faster deployment and scalable adoption. Its multi-agent and hybrid retrieval architecture further enhances accuracy and performance in complex enterprise document environments, strengthening its competitive position in Japan. |
| 7) What differentiates your product/service from that of the competitor(s)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Wissly differentiates itself by offering a fully automated RAG-based AI agent designed specifically for large-scale enterprise document environments. Unlike SI-driven solutions that require heavy customization and long implementation cycles, Wissly minimizes manual setup through an automated preprocessing and indexing pipeline that can learn from massive, distributed internal documents. Its multi-agent and hybrid retrieval architecture enhances accuracy and contextual understanding in complex enterprise systems, including environments with legacy infrastructure and on-premise storage commonly found in Japanese corporations. In addition, Wissly provides a scalable SaaS model with a lower entry barrier, while also supporting on-premise deployment for security-sensitive enterprises, enabling both flexibility and enterprise-grade compliance.                                                                                                                                      |
| 8) If there is a demo video of the product/service, please enter the URL of the video. ※ optional                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H__g1YcEP4k                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |


### □ No

| 3. Global Market Entry Strategy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1) How would you define the potential market of the country you are interested in entering, and what is its size?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| The initial target market in Japan focuses on the country’s advanced manufacturing and logistics sectors, which form a core pillar of the world’s fourth-largest economy. Japan has a highly developed industrial base, with an estimated 8,000–12,000 mid-to-large enterprises operating in manufacturing, logistics, automotive, electronics, and heavy industries where document-intensive workflows are critical.  Assuming an average annual contract value of USD 20,000–70,000 per enterprise, the near-term addressable market is estimated at approximately USD 160–840 million. As enterprise AI and knowledge management markets in Japan are projected to grow at a CAGR of around 15–20%, driven by digital transformation and labor shortages, continued expansion is expected.  Despite high ERP penetration, many Japanese enterprises still rely on siloed file servers, legacy systems, and manual document-based processes. The competitive landscape is largely dominated by high-cost SI-driven projects and global enterprise vendors, creating strong opportunities for scalable, faster-to-deploy AI solutions tailored to document-intensive industries.                                                                                                                                     |

Please describe the customers, products, sales channel, and details of PoC proposals offered to local demand drivers. ※ If the local demand driver is not assigned, 'details of PoC proposals' may be skipped.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Wissly’s entry strategy for Japan will focus on securing initial enterprise PoC projects with mid-to-large manufacturing and logistics companies undergoing digital transformation. Target customers include CIOs, IT managers, and DX leaders managing ERP systems and large-scale internal document environments. The product will be fully localized for the Japanese language and enterprise compliance standards, with both SaaS and on-premise deployment options to meet security-sensitive requirements.  Market entry will be driven through partnerships with local IT service providers and system integrators, accelerating enterprise access and trust-building. Initial PoC proposals will target document-intensive departments such as procurement, quality control, and operations, demonstrating measurable improvements in retrieval speed, reporting efficiency, and decision-support accuracy within a defined 3–6 month period. Upon validation, Wissly will expand across additional departments and affiliated group companies.  Over the next two to three years, growth will rely on reference-based enterprise sales, leveraging flagship clients to build credibility in Japan’s relationship-driven B2B market, supported by a scalable SaaS model and selective strategic partnerships. |

(별첨2) Global Market Entry Application Form — StepHow Inc.
기본 정보
회사 소개 (Elevator Pitch)
StepHow는 2024년 설립된 AI 스타트업으로, 대규모 내부 문서를 로컬 PC에서 자동 학습하는 엔터프라이즈 AI RAG 에이전트 Wissly를 개발. MashUp Ventures, The Ventures, Antler로부터 $50만 시드 투자 유치. 현재 100개 이상 기업 서비스 중이며 미국 법인을 통해 글로벌 확장 중.
피치 영상: https://youtu.be/LZDv2buT0VM
제품/서비스: Wissly
출시 여부: 출시 완료
가격: 클라우드 $20/user/month | 온프레미스 엔터프라이즈 플랜 별도
데모 영상: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H__g1YcEP4k
핵심 기능
- 독자적 RAG 아키텍처로 대규모 기업 문서 자동 전처리·학습
- 문서 검색·분석·비교·생성 자동화
- 무제한 문서 실시간 처리 (고확장성)
- 클라우드 SaaS + 온프레미스 모두 지원
타겟 고객
- 일본 제조·물류 분야 중대형 기업
- CIO, IT 매니저, DX 리더 (ERP: SAP, Oracle 운영 기업)
Pain Point
- 사일로화된 파일 서버·레거시 시스템으로 인한 느린 정보 검색
- 중복 작업, 수동 보고, 개인 경험 의존적 의사결정
경쟁사 및 차별점
경쟁사: 대형 SI 기반 RAG 구현체, 글로벌 엔터프라이즈 소프트웨어 벤더
차별점: 자동화된 RAG 파이프라인, 멀티에이전트·하이브리드 검색 아키텍처, 빠른 배포, 낮은 진입 장벽
글로벌 시장 진출 전략 (일본)
시장 규모
- 대상: 제조·물류·자동차·전자 분야 중대형 기업 약 8,000~12,000개
- 추정 시장 규모: USD 1억 6천만 ~ 8억 4천만 (기업당 연간 계약 $2만~$7만 기준)
- 시장 성장률: CAGR 약 15~20% (디지털 전환·노동력 부족 드라이브)
진출 전략
- 초기 PoC: 조달·품질관리·운영 부서 대상 3~6개월 PoC 진행
- 채널: 현지 IT 서비스 제공업체·SI 파트너십 활용
- 제품 현지화: 일본어 완전 현지화 + 일본 기업 컴플라이언스 대응
- 성장 전략: 레퍼런스 기반 엔터프라이즈 영업 → 계열사 확장

(별첨2) Global Market Entry Application Form — StepHow Inc.
기본 정보
회사 소개 (Elevator Pitch)
StepHow는 2024년 설립된 AI 스타트업으로, 대규모 내부 문서를 로컬 PC에서 자동 학습하는 엔터프라이즈 AI RAG 에이전트 Wissly를 개발. MashUp Ventures, The Ventures, Antler로부터 $50만 시드 투자 유치. 현재 100개 이상 기업 서비스 중이며 미국 법인을 통해 글로벌 확장 중.
피치 영상: https://youtu.be/LZDv2buT0VM
제품/서비스: Wissly
출시 여부: 출시 완료
가격: 클라우드 $20/user/month | 온프레미스 엔터프라이즈 플랜 별도
데모 영상: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H__g1YcEP4k
핵심 기능
- 독자적 RAG 아키텍처로 대규모 기업 문서 자동 전처리·학습
- 문서 검색·분석·비교·생성 자동화
- 무제한 문서 실시간 처리 (고확장성)
- 클라우드 SaaS + 온프레미스 모두 지원
타겟 고객
- 일본 제조·물류 분야 중대형 기업
- CIO, IT 매니저, DX 리더 (ERP: SAP, Oracle 운영 기업)
Pain Point
- 사일로화된 파일 서버·레거시 시스템으로 인한 느린 정보 검색
- 중복 작업, 수동 보고, 개인 경험 의존적 의사결정
경쟁사 및 차별점
경쟁사: 대형 SI 기반 RAG 구현체, 글로벌 엔터프라이즈 소프트웨어 벤더
차별점: 자동화된 RAG 파이프라인, 멀티에이전트·하이브리드 검색 아키텍처, 빠른 배포, 낮은 진입 장벽
글로벌 시장 진출 전략 (일본)
시장 규모
- 대상: 제조·물류·자동차·전자 분야 중대형 기업 약 8,000~12,000개
- 추정 시장 규모: USD 1억 6천만 ~ 8억 4천만 (기업당 연간 계약 $2만~$7만 기준)
- 시장 성장률: CAGR 약 15~20% (디지털 전환·노동력 부족 드라이브)
진출 전략
- 초기 PoC: 조달·품질관리·운영 부서 대상 3~6개월 PoC 진행
- 채널: 현지 IT 서비스 제공업체·SI 파트너십 활용
- 제품 현지화: 일본어 완전 현지화 + 일본 기업 컴플라이언스 대응
- 성장 전략: 레퍼런스 기반 엔터프라이즈 영업 → 계열사 확장

(별첨2) Global Market Entry Application Form — StepHow Inc.
기본 정보
회사 소개 (Elevator Pitch)
StepHow는 2024년 설립된 AI 스타트업으로, 대규모 내부 문서를 로컬 PC에서 자동 학습하는 엔터프라이즈 AI RAG 에이전트 Wissly를 개발. MashUp Ventures, The Ventures, Antler로부터 $50만 시드 투자 유치. 현재 100개 이상 기업 서비스 중이며 미국 법인을 통해 글로벌 확장 중.
피치 영상: https://youtu.be/LZDv2buT0VM
제품/서비스: Wissly
출시 여부: 출시 완료
가격: 클라우드 $20/user/month | 온프레미스 엔터프라이즈 플랜 별도
데모 영상: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=H__g1YcEP4k
핵심 기능
- 독자적 RAG 아키텍처로 대규모 기업 문서 자동 전처리·학습
- 문서 검색·분석·비교·생성 자동화
- 무제한 문서 실시간 처리 (고확장성)
- 클라우드 SaaS + 온프레미스 모두 지원
타겟 고객
- 일본 제조·물류 분야 중대형 기업
- CIO, IT 매니저, DX 리더 (ERP: SAP, Oracle 운영 기업)
Pain Point
- 사일로화된 파일 서버·레거시 시스템으로 인한 느린 정보 검색
- 중복 작업, 수동 보고, 개인 경험 의존적 의사결정
경쟁사 및 차별점
경쟁사: 대형 SI 기반 RAG 구현체, 글로벌 엔터프라이즈 소프트웨어 벤더
차별점: 자동화된 RAG 파이프라인, 멀티에이전트·하이브리드 검색 아키텍처, 빠른 배포, 낮은 진입 장벽
글로벌 시장 진출 전략 (일본)
시장 규모
- 대상: 제조·물류·자동차·전자 분야 중대형 기업 약 8,000~12,000개
- 추정 시장 규모: USD 1억 6천만 ~ 8억 4천만 (기업당 연간 계약 $2만~$7만 기준)
- 시장 성장률: CAGR 약 15~20% (디지털 전환·노동력 부족 드라이브)
진출 전략
- 초기 PoC: 조달·품질관리·운영 부서 대상 3~6개월 PoC 진행
- 채널: 현지 IT 서비스 제공업체·SI 파트너십 활용
- 제품 현지화: 일본어 완전 현지화 + 일본 기업 컴플라이언스 대응
- 성장 전략: 레퍼런스 기반 엔터프라이즈 영업 → 계열사 확장

### 2026 Seoul Startup Hub Global Program Application


### Company Name

| 1) Please give a brief elevator pitch of the company.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| StepHow is an AI startup founded in 2024 by a serial entrepreneur with a venture capital background, alongside experienced AI and engineering leaders. Its flagship product, Wissly, is an enterprise AI RAG agent that learns from large-scale internal documents on local PCs to automate document workflows and support data-driven decision-making. Backed by $0.5M in seed funding from MashUp Ventures, The Ventures, and Antler, StepHow now serves over 100 companies and is expanding globally through its U.S. subsidiary. |

Product/Service Introduction                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |

| ■ Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 3) Please give a brief introduction of the product/service.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Wissly AI leverages a proprietary Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture to automatically preprocess and learn large-scale enterprise documents without manual intervention. It enables AI Agents to perform document search, analysis, comparison, and generation while structuring insights based on contextual relationships across files. Designed for real-time processing of unlimited documents, Wissly ensures high scalability and performance. The cloud version is offered at $20 per user per month, and an enterprise on-premise plan is available for organizations requiring enhanced security and internal deployment. By delivering evidence-based summaries and recommendations, Wissly reduces search time and improves decision-making speed and accuracy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 4) Who are the target customers of the product/service and why?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Wissly targets mid-to-large manufacturing and logistics enterprises in Japan with highly document-intensive operations. Our primary customers are CIOs, IT managers, and digital transformation leaders who oversee ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle, as well as NAS and on-premise file servers. These organizations often struggle with fragmented internal documents, slow information retrieval, repetitive reporting tasks, and decision-making that depends heavily on individual experience rather than structured data. Existing solutions are typically high-cost global vendors that require complex customization and long deployment cycles. Wissly addresses these challenges through a scalable SaaS model with a lower entry barrier, while also offering an on-premise option tailored to security-sensitive enterprises in Japan.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 5) What is the pain point of the target customers the product/service seeks to solve?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| In Japan’s manufacturing and logistics sectors, enterprises manage vast volumes of internal documents across ERP systems, NAS, and on-premise file servers, often combined with legacy infrastructure. This fragmented environment results in slow information retrieval, duplicated work, manual reporting, and decision-making that relies heavily on individual experience rather than consolidated data. Wissly addresses these challenges with an automated RAG-based AI platform that learns from distributed enterprise documents without complex manual configuration and provides contextual search and evidence-based reporting. Compared to traditional SI-driven solutions that require high upfront costs and long deployment cycles, Wissly enables faster implementation, lower entry barriers, and scalable SaaS pricing tailored to enterprise needs.                                                                                                                                                 |
| 6) Who is/are the competitor(s) of the product/service and why?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| In the Japanese market, direct competitors include large SI-based RAG implementations and global enterprise software vendors that offer customized AI or knowledge management solutions. These solutions typically require high upfront investment, complex integration with existing systems, and long deployment cycles. Indirect competitors include generic LLM tools and cloud-based search platforms that are not optimized for large-scale enterprise environments, especially those relying on on-premise servers, NAS storage, and legacy infrastructure commonly found in Japanese corporations. Wissly differentiates itself through an automated RAG pipeline that learns from massive, distributed internal documents without extensive manual configuration, enabling faster deployment and scalable adoption. Its multi-agent and hybrid retrieval architecture further enhances accuracy and performance in complex enterprise document environments, strengthening its competitive position in Japan. |
| 7) What differentiates your product/service from that of the competitor(s)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Wissly differentiates itself by offering a fully automated RAG-based AI agent designed specifically for large-scale enterprise document environments. Unlike SI-driven solutions that require heavy customization and long implementation cycles, Wissly minimizes manual setup through an automated preprocessing and indexing pipeline that can learn from massive, distributed internal documents. Its multi-agent and hybrid retrieval architecture enhances accuracy and contextual understanding in complex enterprise systems, including environments with legacy infrastructure and on-premise storage commonly found in Japanese corporations. In addition, Wissly provides a scalable SaaS model with a lower entry barrier, while also supporting on-premise deployment for security-sensitive enterprises, enabling both flexibility and enterprise-grade compliance.                                                                                                                                      |

- 일본 제조·물류 분야 중대형 기업

- 대상: 제조·물류·자동차·전자 분야 중대형 기업 약 8,000~12,000개

| 1) Please give a brief elevator pitch of the company.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| StepHow is an AI startup founded in 2024 by a serial entrepreneur with a venture capital background, alongside experienced AI and engineering leaders. Its flagship product, Wissly, is an enterprise AI RAG agent that learns from large-scale internal documents on local PCs to automate document workflows and support data-driven decision-making. | ■ Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| 3) Please give a brief introduction of the product/service.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Wissly AI leverages a proprietary Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) architecture to automatically preprocess and learn large-scale enterprise documents without manual intervention. It enables AI Agents to perform document search, analysis, comparison, and generation while structuring insights based on contextual relationships across files. Designed for real-time processing of unlimited documents, Wissly ensures high scalability and performance. The cloud version is offered at $20 per user per month, and an enterprise on-premise plan is available for organizations requiring enhanced security and internal deployment. By delivering evidence-based summaries and recommendations, Wissly reduces search time and improves decision-making speed and accuracy.                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| 4) Who are the target customers of the product/service and why?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Wissly targets mid-to-large manufacturing and logistics enterprises in Japan with highly document-intensive operations. Our primary customers are CIOs, IT managers, and digital transformation leaders who oversee ERP systems such as SAP or Oracle, as well as NAS and on-premise file servers. These organizations often struggle with fragmented internal documents, slow information retrieval, repetitive reporting tasks, and decision-making that depends heavily on individual experience rather than structured data. Existing solutions are typically high-cost global vendors that require complex customization and long deployment cycles. Wissly addresses these challenges through a scalable SaaS model with a lower entry barrier, while also offering an on-premise option tailored to security-sensitive enterprises in Japan.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 5) What is the pain point of the target customers the product/service seeks to solve?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| In Japan’s manufacturing and logistics sectors, enterprises manage vast volumes of internal documents across ERP systems, NAS, and on-premise file servers, often combined with legacy infrastructure. This fragmented environment results in slow information retrieval, duplicated work, manual reporting, and decision-making that relies heavily on individual experience rather than consolidated data. Wissly addresses these challenges with an automated RAG-based AI platform that learns from distributed enterprise documents without complex manual configuration and provides contextual search and evidence-based reporting. Compared to traditional SI-driven solutions that require high upfront costs and long deployment cycles, Wissly enables faster implementation, lower entry barriers, and scalable SaaS pricing tailored to enterprise needs.                                                                                                                                                 |
| 6) Who is/are the competitor(s) of the product/service and why?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| In the Japanese market, direct competitors include large SI-based RAG implementations and global enterprise software vendors that offer customized AI or knowledge management solutions. These solutions typically require high upfront investment, complex integration with existing systems, and long deployment cycles. Indirect competitors include generic LLM tools and cloud-based search platforms that are not optimized for large-scale enterprise environments, especially those relying on on-premise servers, NAS storage, and legacy infrastructure commonly found in Japanese corporations. Wissly differentiates itself through an automated RAG pipeline that learns from massive, distributed internal documents without extensive manual configuration, enabling faster deployment and scalable adoption. Its multi-agent and hybrid retrieval architecture further enhances accuracy and performance in complex enterprise document environments, strengthening its competitive position in Japan. |
| 7) What differentiates your product/service from that of the competitor(s)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Wissly differentiates itself by offering a fully automated RAG-based AI agent designed specifically for large-scale enterprise document environments. Unlike SI-driven solutions that require heavy customization and long implementation cycles, Wissly minimizes manual setup through an automated preprocessing and indexing pipeline that can learn from massive, distributed internal documents. Its multi-agent and hybrid retrieval architecture enhances accuracy and contextual understanding in complex enterprise systems, including environments with legacy infrastructure and on-premise storage commonly found in Japanese corporations. In addition, Wissly provides a scalable SaaS model with a lower entry barrier, while also supporting on-premise deployment for security-sensitive enterprises, enabling both flexibility and enterprise-grade compliance.                                                                                                                                      |
